en: Step up! Step up! We've got fainting fancies!
Nosebleed nougat! That's just in time for school! Puking pastels!
Into the cauldron, handsome! I will have water!
Peruvian instant darkness powder. A real money spinner, that one.
ko: 페루산 즉석 어둠 가루. 진짜 돈벌이야, 그거.

en: Handy if you need to make a quick getaway. Hello, ladies. Love potions, eh?
Yeah, they really do work. Then again, the way we hear it, sis, you're doing just fine on your own.
Meaning? Are you not currently dating Dean Thomas?
ko: 지금 딘 토마스와 사귀고 있지 않나요?

en: How much for this? Five galleons. How much for me?
ko: 이거 얼마예요? 오 갤리언이에요. 나의 가격은?

en: Five galleons. I'm your brother. Ten galleons.
